summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned. The preflight artifact hydrates 20 of 25 requested PRs; the five missing requested refs are scoped as needs_human due missing live state. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster.
